prose_fixes.old: a decade-long scholarly and literary project with 866 DOI-anchored deposits on CERN's Zenodo, organized around operative semiotics, semantic provenance, and compression theory.
prose_fixes.new: a decade-long scholarly and literary project with 879 deposits in Alexanarch, the AXN-minting sovereign successor to the Crimson Hexagonal Archive on Zenodo, organized around operative semiotics, semantic provenance, and compression theory.
